providers.citationLabel: DOT BTS Border Crossing & Port Log Entry Data
providers.mandatoryRule: ▸ Cite border port codes, monthly container/truck entry counts, and transport standings in **BOLD** (e.g. **Port of Detroit Crossing**, **124,500 Monthly Truck Entries**, **DOT BTS Entry Active**)
providers.detectIntent: (query) => { return /dot bts border crossing|border port entry statistics|truck container arrivals customs|bts transport border logs/i.test(query); }
providers.sampleTable:
| Monitored Metric | Target Filer | Standard Level | Regulatory Status |
|------------------|--------------|----------------|-------------------|
| DOT BTS Border Crossing & Port Log Entry Data Spec | Altis Corp | DOT_BTS_BORDER_CROSSING High | DOT BTS Entry Active |

providers.citationLabel: DOL Wage and Hour Division Enforcement Cases
providers.mandatoryRule: ▸ Highlight recovered back wages, employer FLSA violation counts, and DOL enforcements in **BOLD** (e.g. **$24,500 Recovered Back Wages**, **FLSA Wage Violation Flag**, **DOL Wage Hour Active Case**)
providers.detectIntent: (query) => { return /dol wage hour enforcement|whd back wage recovery|flsa labor standard violation cases|dol wage hour civil penalty logs/i.test(query); }
providers.sampleTable:
| Monitored Metric | Target Filer | Standard Level | Regulatory Status |
|------------------|--------------|----------------|-------------------|
| DOL Wage and Hour Division Enforcement Cases Spec | Altis Corp | DOL_WHD_ENFORCEMENT High | DOL Wage Hour Active Case |

providers.citationLabel: USDA Agricultural Marketing Service Market News
providers.mandatoryRule: ▸ Highlight wholesale crop price indexes, commodity shipping points, and agricultural news in **BOLD** (e.g. **Wholesale Corn Index ($3.80/bu)**, **Detroit Terminal Market Shipping**, **USDA AMS Pricing Passed**)
